initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    FacRank,
    FacFirstName,
    FacLastName,
    FacSalary
FROM (
    SELECT 
        FacRank,
        FacFirstName,
        FacLastName,
        FacSalary,
        ABS(FacSalary - AVG(FacSalary) OVER (PARTITION BY FacRank)) AS salary_diff
    FROM university_faculty
) subquery
WHERE salary_diff = (
    SELECT MIN(salary_diff)
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            FacRank,
            ABS(FacSalary - AVG(FacSalary) OVER (PARTITION BY FacRank)) AS salary_diff
        FROM university_faculty
    ) inner_subquery
    WHERE inner_subquery.FacRank = subquery.FacRank
);

SELECT 
    FacRank,
    FacFirstName,
    FacLastName,
    FacSalary
FROM university_faculty
WHERE ABS(FacSalary - (
    SELECT AVG(FacSalary)
    FROM university_faculty AS f2
    WHERE f2.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
)) = (
    SELECT MIN(ABS(FacSalary - (
        SELECT AVG(FacSalary)
        FROM university_faculty AS f3
        WHERE f3.FacRank = f4.FacRank
    )))
    FROM university_faculty AS f4
    WHERE f4.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
)
ORDER BY FacRank, FacLastName, FacFirstName;

SELECT 
    FacRank,
    FacFirstName,
    FacLastName,
    FacSalary
FROM (
    SELECT 
        FacRank,
        FacFirstName,
        FacLastName,
        FacSalary,
        ABS(FacSalary - AVG(FacSalary) OVER (PARTITION BY FacRank)) AS salary_diff
    FROM university_faculty
)
ORDER BY salary_diff ASC;

SELECT 
    FacRank, 
    FacFirstName, 
    FacLastName, 
    FacSalary
FROM 
    university_faculty
ORDER BY 
    ABS(FacSalary - (
        SELECT AVG(FacSalary) 
        FROM university_faculty AS f2 
        WHERE f2.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
    ));

SELECT FacRank, FacFirstName, FacLastName, FacSalary
FROM university_faculty
WHERE ABS(FacSalary - (
    SELECT AVG(FacSalary)
    FROM university_faculty AS f2
    WHERE f2.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
)) = (
    SELECT MIN(ABS(FacSalary - avg_sal.avg_salary))
    FROM (
        SELECT AVG(FacSalary) AS avg_salary, FacRank
        FROM university_faculty
        GROUP BY FacRank
    ) AS avg_sal
    WHERE avg_sal.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
);

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT FacRank, FacFirstName, FacLastName, FacSalary
FROM university_faculty
WHERE ABS(FacSalary - (
    SELECT AVG(FacSalary)
    FROM university_faculty AS f2
    WHERE f2.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
)) = (
    SELECT MIN(ABS(FacSalary - avg_sal.avg_salary))
    FROM (
        SELECT AVG(FacSalary) AS avg_salary, FacRank
        FROM university_faculty
        GROUP BY FacRank
    ) AS avg_sal
    WHERE avg_sal.FacRank = university_faculty.FacRank
);
